title: bidaria longiretinaculata
intro: Bidaria longiretinaculata, also known as Bidens longipes, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bidaria longiretinaculata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Bidaria longiretinaculata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
